{{- $ogImage := partialCached "img/overlay.html" (dict "image" site.Params.huggingface.images.site "size" 440) }} {{- $ogText := partialCached "img/solid-color-image.html" (slice "#976941" 760 440) }} {{- $fontPath := "fonts/ArchivoBlack-Regular.ttf" }} {{- $font := "" }} {{- with try (resources.Get $fontPath) }} {{- with .Err }} {{- errorf "%s" . }} {{- else with .Value }} {{- $font = . }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "Unable to get resource %s" $fontPath }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- $optsText := dict "alignx" "center" "aligny" "center" "color" "#fbfaf5" "font" $font "linespacing" 8 "size" 60 "x" (mul $ogText.Width 0.5 | int) "y" (mul $ogText.Height 0.5 | int) }} {{- $ogText = $ogText | images.Filter (images.Text site.Params.Description $optsText) }} {{- $optsTitle := dict "alignx" "center" "aligny" "center" "color" "#000000" "font" $font "linespacing" 12 "size" 61 "x" 600 "y" 47 }} {{ $optsURL := dict "alignx" "left" "aligny" "center" "color" "#000000" "font" $font "linespacing" 8 "size" 24 "x" 10 "y" 582 }} {{- /* dark yellow: #ffb300 */ -}} {{- /* light yellow: #fcd804 */ -}} {{- /* bright yellow: #ebb951 */ -}} {{- /* brown: #976941 */ -}} {{- $filter := slice (images.Padding 0 760 0 0 "#976941") (images.Padding 95 0 95 0 "#ebb951") (images.Overlay $ogText 441 95) (images.Text site.Title $optsTitle) (images.Text site.Home.Permalink $optsURL) }} {{- return ($ogImage | images.Filter $filter | resources.Copy "img/og-image.png") }} {{- /**/ -}}
